title: ‘Caught Taking Rs 5 lakh On Camera’: Kirti Azad Drops Explosive Corruption Charge Against Rebel TMC MP Kakoli Ghosh Dastidar
description: TMC MP Kirti Azad launched a fierce attack on rebel party leaders amid a deepening internal split, accusing breakaway leaders like Kakoli Ghosh Dastidar and Ritabrata Banerjee of corruption and political opportunism for questioning Mamata Banerjee.
